scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/tabular build && bun run --cwd packages/parquet build
scripts.build:lib: bun run --cwd packages/core build:lib && bun run --cwd packages/tabular build && bun run --cwd packages/parquet build
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run lint:rust && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/core/dist && rm -rf crates/wasm-adapter/pkg && cargo clean
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core test && bun run --cwd packages/tabular test && bun run --cwd packages/parquet test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/tabular typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/parquet typecheck
scripts.validate:full: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run test:rust && bun run lint:rust && bun run build
